atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: James presents today with back pain following a golf injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain following a golf injury, specifically a pop and immediate ground contact during his backswing on Saturday morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He initially took tylenol and ibuprofen for the pain, but found little relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports feeling a dropped foot in his right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports some struggling with his right leg, which improved slightly this morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has a 10-year history of lower back surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports avoiding salty foods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports a weight gain of 5 pounds over the summer.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He denies problems laying flat.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He monitors his blood sugars at home and is currently taking metformin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports fatigue for the past two months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a 2 out of 6 systolic ejection murmur.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals decreased range of motion with flexion and extension of the lumbar spine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Straight leg raise elicited a positive response on the right side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has an acute lumbar strain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports lumbar strain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports likely secondary to recent injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient continues to manage type 2 diabetes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient continues to manage congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribed meloxicam 15 milligrams once daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribed a refill of lisinopril 20 milligrams once daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician increased the metformin dosage to 1000 milligrams twice daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician ordered an MRI to rule out disc herniation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician ordered a hemoglobin A1c in approximately two months

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will schedule a follow-up appointment in approximately two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician referred the patient to physical therapy
